name: TIMBERLAND BANCORP INC
business: Timberland Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company that operates through its subsidiary, Timberland Bank. The Bank provides a full range of lending and deposit services to consumers and businesses across six counties in Washington. Lending activities are focused on real estate mortgage loans, including residential and commercial construction loans, one- to four-family residential loans, multi-family loans, commercial real estate loans, and land loans.

exposures.sentence: Lending activities have been focused primarily on the origination of loans secured by real estate, including residential and commercial / multi-family construction loans, one- to four-family residential loans, multi-family loans, commercial real estate loans and land loans.

Lending activities have been focused primarily on the origination of loans secured by real estate, including residential and commercial / multi-family construction loans, one- to four-family residential loans, multi-family loans, commercial real estate loans and land loans.
The Bank also originates commercial business loans and other consumer loans.

catalysts.event: Open new branch in University Place
